title: athyrium pulcherrimum
intro: Athyrium pulcherrimum, also known as the lady fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Athyrium pulcherrimum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the dried leaves in capsules or tinctures.
